valueProposition.title: Who Am I
valueProposition.intro: Software engineering, enterprise systems, and operational precision—applied where business and automation meet.

businessSystems.title: Business & ERP Systems
businessSystems.description: I design and build reliable web and mobile applications for real operational use—internal tools, workflow systems, and ERP-style platforms that scale with the business.

sapLogistics.title: SAP & Logistics Expertise
sapLogistics.description: Hands-on experience with SAP EWM, SAP WM, warehouse operations, and delivery processes—domain knowledge that helps software fit real logistics environments.

automationMindset.title: Automation & Control Engineering
automationMindset.description: Through control and automation engineering studies, I bridge software with industrial processes—focused on reliability, precision, and systems that work in the field.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Contact details and CV downloads for professional reference.

personalInfo.title: About Me
personalInfo.summary: I am a Software & Automation Engineer with more than 5 years of experience building reliable, scalable web, mobile, and enterprise applications using React, Node.js, Python, .NET, TypeScript, and cloud technologies. My background in SAP logistics and warehouse operations adds precise operational understanding alongside software engineering skills. I am currently studying Control and Automation Engineering, focused on intelligent systems that combine software, operations, and industrial automation with engineering discipline.

experience.title: Experience
experience.intro: From software development to logistics operations and SAP-driven environments, my career combines technical implementation with practical business understanding.

strauss.title: Logistics Process Lead
bullets: Manage inbound and outbound delivery processes across warehouse environments using SAP EWM and SAP WM.
Support integration of RF devices and operational workflows.
Train users and create process documentation and operational guides.
Contribute to warehouse automation initiatives and coordination between operations and IT.

besttuqay.title: Freelance Software Engineer
bullets: Develop and maintain modern web applications for client needs.
Translate requirements into practical, maintainable software solutions.
Deliver features with focus on usability, quality, and business value.

innovisec.title: Senior Software Developer
bullets: Built and maintained applications using Node.js, React, Angular, .NET, and React Native.
Implemented real-time solutions and serverless services to improve product performance.
Collaborated across development and DevOps workflows to support production delivery.
Contributed to R&D projects with focus on reliability, scalability, and user experience.

strauss_tech.title: Technical Support Specialist
bullets: Supported users across SAP, Active Directory, and internal systems.
Improved operational efficiency through support documentation and process assistance.
Helped maintain stable warehouse-related support processes.

qualitest.title: QA Automation and Manual Junior Tester
bullets: Performed automated and manual testing for Microsoft security-related products.
Built and configured complex test environments.
Worked with developers to validate fixes and improve software quality.

atid.description: Currently pursuing engineering studies with electrical licensing track.

ort.description: Graduated with honors, focused on software engineering and development.

skills.title: Skills
skills.intro: Technologies and domains I use to build scalable, practical solutions.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.intro: Selected projects that reflect my experience in business systems, enterprise software, modern cross-platform development, and open-source tools.

ipresent.title: iPresent - Digital Signage System
ipresent.description: Architected a WPF-based digital signage platform for multi-screen content delivery with scheduling, real-time updates, and diverse media support across operational sites.
ipresent.outcome: Standardized multi-location communication and improved content delivery reliability.

imanage.title: iManage - Small Business ERP System
imanage.description: Engineered a scalable ERP platform covering inventory, CRM, accounting, orders, and reporting using .NET Core, SQL Server, and React.
imanage.outcome: Centralized inventory, accounting, and sales into a single source of truth for small business operations.

gofresh.title: GoFresh - Drinks Shop Menu App
gofresh.description: A digital menu application for a drinks shop built with serverless architecture. Features include dynamic menu management with Sanity.io integration, like functionality for menu items, real-time menu updates, and responsive design for customers to browse drinks and place orders.

asend.title: ASend - Automated Congratulations Cards
asend.description: An automated congratulations card system built with Supabase for seamless card generation and customization. Features include automated card creation, customizable templates, real-time database management, and user-friendly interface for creating personalized congratulatory messages.

myShop.title: myShop - Ticket Management System
myShop.description: Architected a modern ticketing solution spanning web, mobile, and containerized backend services—migrated from a legacy system using React, React Native, Deno, Docker, and Supabase.
myShop.outcome: Synchronized local and cloud data flows, reduced maintenance overhead, and improved terminal uptime across platforms.

dup_py.title: Dup_py - Duplicate File Finder
dup_py.description: Maintained an open-source fork of DUDE, a cross-platform desktop utility for finding and managing duplicate files on Linux and Windows. Supports multi-folder scanning, SHA1 hashing, image similarity detection, and safe delete workflows.
dup_py.outcome: Helps users reclaim disk space safely with transparent duplicate review and cross-platform portability.

personalInfo.summary: Experienced Full Stack Developer with over 5 years of expertise in React, Node.js, and .NET. I aspire to develop as an autonomous and leading developer in ERP systems, with emphasis on integrating advanced technologies, automation and innovation. Based on practical experience in SAP system management, software development and implementing autonomous solutions, I am committed to leading complex technological processes and bringing significant value to the organization.

experience.title: Logistics Process Lead
experience.description: Responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining automation systems and monitoring solutions with electrical engineering expertise.
achievements: Design and implement automation systems for industrial processes
Develop monitoring solutions for electrical and mechanical systems
Maintain and troubleshoot electrical systems and equipment
Ensure compliance with electrical safety standards and regulations
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to optimize production processes
Provide technical support and training for automation systems

education.description: Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science at Atid Maloot.

projects.title: E-commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce platform built with React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

certifications.description: Certified in SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) implementation and configuration.
